description: Perform an ecological community analysis on the Barro Colorado Island (BCI) dataset using the 'vegan' R package to analyze how tree community composition varies by habitat type and stream proximity. Using the built-in 'vegan::BCI' and 'vegan::BCI.env' datasets, generate and save the following deliverables to /home/ga/RProjects/output/: an alpha diversity CSV ('bci_alpha_diversity.csv') for all 50 plots including species richness, Shannon index, Simpson index, and Pielou's evenness (Columns: plot, richness, shannon, simpson, evenness); an NMDS ordination CSV ('bci_ordination.csv') using k=2 and Bray-Curtis distance (Columns: plot, NMDS1, NMDS2, Habitat, Stream); a community tests CSV ('bci_community_tests.csv') reporting the NMDS stress value and PERMANOVA (adonis2) results for 'Habitat' and 'Stream' effects (Columns: test, statistic, p_value, R2); a multi-panel figure ('bci_community_analysis.png') containing a boxplot of Shannon diversity by Habitat (Panel A), an NMDS ordination scatterplot colored by Habitat (Panel B), and a species accumulation curve (Panel C); and the reproducible R script ('bci_analysis.R') used for the analysis.
